description: Cinematic founder/operator portraits. Real people in real environments. Magazine-quality.
base_prompt: hyper-realistic fashion portrait of {subject_description}, {environment_description}, cinematic lighting, {mood}, shot on {camera_model}

subject.pose: string — specific body position, angle, weight distribution. e.g. 'leaning casually on balcony railing, body angled three-quarters toward camera, head turned slightly toward viewer'
subject.expression: string — specific facial muscles, eye state, jaw tension. e.g. 'genuine mid-laugh, eyes slightly squinted, relaxed jaw, no teeth showing'

wardrobe.style: string — overall aesthetic label. e.g. 'elevated casual streetwear'
wardrobe.top: string — fabric weight, fit, color, collar detail. e.g. 'cream-colored heavyweight t-shirt, slightly oversized, thick collar'
wardrobe.outerwear: string — material, texture, button state. e.g. 'unbuttoned dark olive bomber jacket, matte nylon, subtle texture'
wardrobe.bottom: string — fit, color, distressing level. e.g. 'black slim-fit jeans, no distressing'
wardrobe.shoes: string — material, color, branding level. e.g. 'minimal white leather sneakers with subtle branding'
accessories: array of specific items with material, color, placement. e.g. 'thin silver chain bracelet on right wrist', 'matte black Apple Watch Ultra on left wrist'

environment.location_type: string — e.g. 'rooftop bar', 'modern loft office', 'city sidewalk'
environment.time_of_day: string — specific light condition. e.g. 'golden hour sunset'
background_elements: array of 3-5 specific background items with blur/bokeh notes. e.g. 'softly blurred city skyline with bokeh lights', 'warm string lights overhead'

camera.camera_model: string — specific camera body. e.g. 'Leica M11', 'Sony A7IV', 'Fujifilm X-T5'
camera.shot_type: enum: extreme_close_up | close_up | medium_close_up | medium | medium_full | full | wide
camera.perspective: enum: eye_level | low_angle | high_angle | birds_eye | worms_eye

lighting.key_light: string — direction, quality, falloff. e.g. 'warm sunset light coming from camera-left, soft falloff across face'
lighting.fill_light: string — source, intensity. e.g. 'subtle cool fill from city reflections on camera-right'
lighting.rim_light: string — position, effect. e.g. 'thin highlight on hair and shoulders from low sun behind subject'

color_and_style.grade: string — specific color grading. e.g. 'cinematic teal and orange with soft contrast'
color_and_style.grain: string — type and intensity. e.g. 'subtle digital grain, not vintage'
color_and_style.overall_style: string — cultural reference. e.g. 'A24 movie still meets luxury streetwear campaign'

negative_prompt: no over-sharpened skin, avoid plastic look
no stock photo staging or forced poses

rooftop_golden.description: Golden hour rooftop portrait. Warm, aspirational, NYC energy.

background_elements: softly blurred city skyline with bokeh lights

lighting.key_light: warm sunset light coming from camera-left, soft falloff across face
lighting.fill_light: subtle cool fill from city reflections on camera-right
lighting.rim_light: thin highlight on hair and shoulders from low sun behind subject

color_and_style.grade: cinematic teal and orange with soft contrast
color_and_style.overall_style: A24 movie still meets luxury streetwear campaign

office_morning.description: Morning light in modern loft. Professional but not corporate.

environment.location_type: modern loft office with exposed brick
environment.time_of_day: early morning, soft diffused daylight through large windows
background_elements: out-of-focus monitor with dark UI on standing desk
potted monstera plant in ceramic pot
minimalist floating shelves with few books

lighting.key_light: large window camera-left, soft wrap across face with gradual falloff
lighting.fill_light: ambient bounce from white ceiling, very subtle

color_and_style.grade: desaturated editorial, lifted blacks, slight warmth in midtones
color_and_style.overall_style: Monocle magazine meets The Information editorial

street_candid.description: Street-level candid. Editorial fashion meets documentary.

background_elements: blurred boutique storefronts with warm interior lighting
single passing taxi in deep background blur

lighting.key_light: overcast sky, even soft light from above, no harsh shadows
lighting.fill_light: ambient city reflections from windows and pavement
lighting.rim_light: subtle edge light from shop windows behind subject

color_and_style.grade: muted film stock, slightly lifted shadows, desaturated greens
color_and_style.overall_style: The Face magazine meets Kinfolk street editorial

conference_speaker.description: On-stage or backstage speaker portrait. Authority energy.

environment.time_of_day: indoor, mixed artificial and natural light
background_elements: out-of-focus stage curtain or LED wall with abstract patterns

lighting.key_light: strong directional light from camera-right, theatrical falloff
lighting.rim_light: bright edge light from stage lighting behind subject

color_and_style.grade: high contrast, deep blacks, selective warm highlights on skin
color_and_style.overall_style: TED speaker portrait meets Rolling Stone editorial
